---
title: "Tree 125 — Olea"
toc: false
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_trees_from_csv.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

{{< include '_tree-species-info/_olive.md' >}}

## Tree data

**Diameter at breast height (1.3m):** 9.2cm

**Age group:** Semi-mature

**Notes:** Measured below tag
